---
theme-settings:
  theme: default
  barposition: top

survey-settings:
  mode: preview
  show-previous: false
  use-cookies: false
  auto-scroll: false
  rate-survey: false
  system-language: en
  highlight-unanswered: true
  highlight-color: blue
  capture-metadata: true
  all-required: false
---

```{r}
library(surveydown)
```

--- page1

# Data Storage Test - Page 1

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc',
  id    = 'fruit',
  label = "Favorite fruit?",
  option = c(
    'Apple'  = 'apple',
    'Banana' = 'banana',
    'Cherry' = 'cherry'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'mc_multiple',
  id    = 'colors',
  label = "Favorite colors?",
  option = c(
    'Red'   = 'red',
    'Blue'  = 'blue',
    'Green' = 'green'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'text',
  id    = 'name',
  label = "Your name?"
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'numeric',
  id    = 'age',
  label = "Your age?"
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'select',
  id    = 'size',
  label = "T-shirt size?",
  option = c(
    'Small'  = 's',
    'Medium' = 'm',
    'Large'  = 'l'
  )
)

# Self-contained data-URI images (a red and a blue square) so the test
# needs no image files
sd_question(
  type   = 'mc_image',
  id     = 'shape',
  label  = "Pick a color:",
  option = c('Red' = 'red', 'Blue' = 'blue'),
  image  = c(
    "data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjQwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQwIiBmaWxsPSJyZWQiLz48L3N2Zz4=",
    "data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjQwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQwIiBmaWxsPSJibHVlIi8+PC9zdmc+"
  )
)

# Unnamed option vector -> images only, no captions (still stores values)
sd_question(
  type   = 'mc_image',
  id     = 'shape_plain',
  label  = "Pick a color (no caption):",
  option = c('red', 'blue'),
  image  = c(
    "data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjQwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQwIiBmaWxsPSJyZWQiLz48L3N2Zz4=",
    "data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjQwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQwIiBmaWxsPSJibHVlIi8+PC9zdmc+"
  )
)

sd_question(
  type   = 'mc_multiple_image',
  id     = 'shapes',
  label  = "Pick colors:",
  option = c('Red' = 'red', 'Blue' = 'blue'),
  image  = c(
    "data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjQwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQwIiBmaWxsPSJyZWQiLz48L3N2Zz4=",
    "data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI0MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI0MCI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjQwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjQwIiBmaWxsPSJibHVlIi8+PC9zdmc+"
  )
)
```

--- page2

# Data Storage Test - Page 2

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc_buttons',
  id    = 'pet',
  label = "Favorite pet?",
  option = c(
    'Cat' = 'cat',
    'Dog' = 'dog'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'mc_multiple_buttons',
  id    = 'drinks',
  label = "Favorite drinks?",
  option = c(
    'Coffee' = 'coffee',
    'Tea'    = 'tea',
    'Juice'  = 'juice'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'textarea',
  id    = 'comments',
  label = "Any comments?"
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'slider',
  id    = 'satisfaction',
  label = "How satisfied are you?",
  option = c(
    'Very unsatisfied' = 'very_unsatisfied',
    'Unsatisfied'      = 'unsatisfied',
    'Neutral'          = 'neutral',
    'Satisfied'        = 'satisfied',
    'Very satisfied'   = 'very_satisfied'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'slider_numeric',
  id    = 'rating',
  label = "Rate from 0 to 10:",
  option = seq(0, 10, 1)
)

sd_question(
  type    = 'slider_numeric',
  id      = 'rating_range',
  label   = "Pick a range from 0 to 10:",
  option  = seq(0, 10, 1),
  default = c(3, 7)
)
```

--- page3

# Data Storage Test - Page 3

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'date',
  id    = 'birthday',
  label = "Pick a date:"
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'daterange',
  id    = 'trip',
  label = "Pick a date range:"
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'matrix',
  id    = 'quality',
  label = "Rate our service:",
  row = c(
    'Speed'   = 'speed',
    'Support' = 'support'
  ),
  option = c(
    'Good' = 'good',
    'Bad'  = 'bad'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'matrix_multiple',
  id    = 'features',
  label = "Which features apply? (select all)",
  row = c(
    'Website' = 'website',
    'App'     = 'app'
  ),
  option = c(
    'Fast'   = 'fast',
    'Simple' = 'simple',
    'Cheap'  = 'cheap'
  )
)
```

--- end

## End of the data storage test survey.

```{r}
sd_close()
```
